# Partner Category Description

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds a description field to contact tags.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

1. Create a Tag: Navigate to CRM > Tags and click on "Create" to add a
   new tag.
2. Add a Description: Provide a detailed explanation of the tag's
   purpose and criteria in the newly added "Description" field.
